creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-08-23 11:10:21 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    audio                Makefile 
  Added files:
    audio/pavucontrol    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  PulseAudio Volume Control (pavucontrol) is a simple GTK based volume control
  tool ("mixer") for the PulseAudio sound server. In contrast to classic mixer
  tools this one allows you to control both the volume of hardware devices and of
  each playback stream seperately.
  
  WWW: http://0pointer.de/lennart/projects/pavucontrol/
  
  PR:             ports/115320
  Submitted by:   Romain TartiÃ¨re <romain at blogreen.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.884     +1 -0      ports/audio/Makefile
  1.1       +24 -0     ports/audio/pavucontrol/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/audio/pavucontrol/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/audio/pavucontrol/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/audio/pavucontrol/pkg-plist (new)
